description_long: This is a large, multi-functional desk constructed primarily from dark wood or wood laminate, featuring a spacious main work surface with a curved front edge for ergonomic comfort. On the left side, there is a vertical cabinet with a door, while the right side includes a set of three open corner shelves above the desktop. Below the main surface, the left pedestal contains three pull-out drawers with metallic handles, and the right side is open, providing legroom. The upper section includes a raised shelf supported by a metal post, suitable for placing a monitor or decorative items, and a small white cabinet door adds visual contrast. The overall design is modern and practical, offering ample storage and organization options for office or study environments.
description: A modern, dark wood desk with multiple drawers, shelves, and a raised monitor shelf, featuring both open and closed storage options.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main work surface, left cabinet, right open shelves, and the white cabinet door.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the desk, the vertical cabinet, and the curved profile of the desktop.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the full layout of the work surface, drawers, open shelves, and the raised monitor shelf.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the open shelving and the curved edge of the desktop.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the drawers, open shelves, and curved desktop edge, intended for seating and direct interaction.
